text: All Fikiri plans include a 7-day free trial. No credit card is required to get started.

Starter fits small businesses getting started. Growth fits teams that need more automation and higher limits. Business is for established companies. Enterprise is for large organizations with custom needs.
You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately and billing is prorated.
If you approach your monthly AI response limit, Fikiri notifies you. You can upgrade your plan or purchase additional responses.
Core automation paths are live today. Some advanced actions are marked partial or coming soon in Automation Studio so teams can plan safely.
The Starter plan is $49 per month and includes 200 AI responses per month, core email automation, simple CRM integration, 500 emails per month, and basic analytics.
The Growth plan is $99 per month and includes 800 AI responses per month, advanced CRM features, workflow automation, 2,000 emails per month, and priority email support.
The Business plan is $199 per month and includes 4,000 AI responses per month, white-label options, custom integrations, 10,000 emails per month, phone support, and API access.
The Enterprise plan is $499 per month for large organizations with custom requirements, unlimited AI responses, dedicated support, and SLA options. Contact sales for custom needs.
Fikiri Solutions helps teams that run on email and customer conversations respond faster, organize relationships, and spend less time on repetitive admin.
aliases: what do you do for small businesses

text: Fikiri focuses on clearer inboxes, reliable follow-up, and tools staff will actually use for teams that book jobs, handle inbound inquiries, or manage a sales pipeline.
Fikiri works with Florida service businesses and similar SMB teams that need practical workflow fixes before buying more software.
Fikiri delivers three connected capabilities: email automation, CRM management, and an AI assistant copilot for daily operations.
Fikiri email automation classifies and routes inbound mail, helps structure replies, and works alongside Gmail and Outlook workflows.
Email automation classifies and routes messages so urgent client work surfaces first and teams spend less time on manual inbox triage.
Fikiri helps draft and structure email responses your team can review and send, with consistent follow-up instead of rewriting the same replies.
Fikiri's AI email assistant classifies and routes inbound mail, helps draft and structure replies, and works with Gmail and Outlook for small-team email workflows.
The AI email assistant goal is fewer missed leads, less manual triage, and more time on revenue work instead of inbox housekeeping.
Fikiri CRM keeps contacts, conversations, and next steps in one place for small teams without heavy enterprise consulting.
CRM ties leads and customers to real activity with clear stages and ownership so teams know who follows up and when.
Fikiri CRM is lightweight for small teams: merge duplicates, keep email as a stable identity, and avoid scattered spreadsheets.
Fikiri's AI assistant is a copilot for daily operations with summaries and next actions grounded in your workflows, not generic filler.
The AI assistant answers process and follow-up questions with concise suggestions aligned to your automation setup and complements email plus CRM.
Fikiri integrates with Gmail workflows for email automation and inbox assistance on supported plans.
Fikiri supports Outlook-style email workflows alongside Gmail on Growth plans and above.
Fikiri offers a workflow audit intake at fikirisolutions.com/intake to review where time and leads leak in your operations.
A workflow audit maps one end-to-end workflow in plain language and gives a do-this-next list, including what not to automate yet.
Fikiri offers consulting and implementation help for Florida SMB teams that need quotes, custom automation, or done-for-you workflow fixes.
Fikiri is system-fixers first: map the workflow leak before forcing new software, and keep customer-facing messages human-approved.
Service workflows usually break between five beats: input, decision, execution, follow-up, and money. Fikiri audits where handoffs fail between those beats.
Common leaks include inquiries that never get owned, quotes without follow-up, and CRM data that stays behind the inbox.
Fikiri fits landscaping and field-service teams that handle quote requests, seasonal reminders, and follow-up by email.
Fikiri can help restaurants and hospitality teams organize inbound inquiries, reservations, and customer follow-up workflows.
Fikiri supports clinics and wellness practices that manage appointments and patient communication, without claiming HIPAA certification unless published separately.
Home services and trades businesses use Fikiri for emergency calls, quote requests, dispatch coordination, and email follow-up.
Professional services teams use Fikiri for client inquiries, proposals, and pipeline follow-up without heavy enterprise CRM consulting.
Fikiri focuses on email, CRM, and workflow automation—not custom website design. For project questions, use the contact page or workflow audit intake.
Fikiri does not publish third-party compliance certifications or money-back guarantees as verified marketing claims on the public site. Contact info@fikirisolutions.com for compliance questions.
Detailed customer ROI write-ups are not published as verified marketing evidence on the public site. Use the workflow audit or contact page for tailored examples.
You can contact Fikiri at info@fikirisolutions.com or through the contact page at fikirisolutions.com/contact.
For a structured workflow review, continue at fikirisolutions.com/intake. For general questions, use fikirisolutions.com/contact.
You can start a 7-day free trial from the pricing page without a credit card to explore core email automation and CRM features.
This site assistant answers product and pricing questions, runs a short fit check, starts a workflow audit intake, or points you to contact options—without needing an API key.
